question: I'm driving in for a bit of sightseeing. Where should I go to avoid heavy traffic, find something to visit, and park easily?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find zones with low traffic congestion, find open tourist attractions, find available parking spots | MAP: smart-traffic-monitoring-mock GET /traffic-sensor, smart-tourist-attractions-mock GET /attraction, smart-parking-mock GET /parking-spot | CHAIN: SQL join on zoneId to correlate low congestion, open status, and available parking | FILTER: congestionLevel!=high, status=open, available=true | VALIDATE: ✓

input.sql_query: SELECT t.zoneId, a.name as attraction_name, p.location as parking_location FROM get_traffic_sensors t JOIN get_attractions a ON t.zoneId = a.zoneId JOIN get_parking_spots p ON t.zoneId = p.zoneId WHERE t.congestionLevel != 'high' AND a.status = 'open' AND p.available = true GROUP BY t.zoneId, a.name, p.location ORDER BY t.congestionLevel ASC LIMIT 5
